Phase-14.NAME: Cleanup and Polish (P6)
Phase-14.goal: Code quality improvements, module splitting, admin audit infrastructure.
Phase-14.step-1: M-003: Split vpn/service.py (1112 lines) into 4 files.
Phase-14.step-3: M-026: Add AdminAuditEvent model and AdminAuditMiddleware.
Phase-14.step-5: M-010: Remove dead App.tsx in admin frontend.
Phase-14.step-6: M-001/M-006: Migrate all API routes to /api/v1 prefix.
Phase-14.step-7: M-001: Move hardcoded krtpn.com URL to Settings.frontend_url.
